packageRules.description: Packages: Use node versioning for LTS awareness
Packages: Major updates only for node engines

TEMPORARY: freeze actions/create-github-app-token at v3.1.1. v3.2.0 breaks release-please-action's multi-release (monorepo) flow with a 403 on POST /releases. Remove this rule once the v3.2.0 regression is resolved upstream and re-verified.
